channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Remow的 It的 动画 Streams My Stepmother Stepsisters Arent Wicked 动画 on YouTube
item.description: Anime premieres on July 8 ― Anime distributor Remow's "It's Anime" free anime YouTube channel announced on X (formerly Twitter) on Monday that it will stream the television anime of Otsuji's My... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Remow's 'It's Anime' Streams My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren't Wicked Anime on YouTube

item.title: [续作] MyAnimeList Marriagetoxin Gets 第二 季度 Winter 2027
